office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, patrol, investigations, jail and civil functions, staffing, training, budgeting, and public safety.
race_blurb: Four law-enforcement candidates seek the open office, differing primarily in command experience and the specificity of their enforcement and management priorities.

candidates.summary: Frase is a county law-enforcement professional emphasizing deputy support, training, constitutional policing, trust, and public safety.
highlights: Emphasizes constitutional policing, training, and deputy support [S2]

safety.basis: His platform centers policing capacity and constitutional enforcement, supporting a modest enforcement lean.

experience.basis: Law-enforcement experience provides an institutional record, balanced by no documented command or elected-sheriff tenure.

candidates.summary: McKnight is a deputy police chief and former county deputy emphasizing accountability, safety, staff development, and operational and budget management.
highlights: Serves as Chehalis deputy police chief [S1][S2]
Previously served as a county deputy and manages personnel, operations, and budgets [S2]

safety.basis: Command leadership and public-safety emphasis support an enforcement lean without a maximal mechanism.

experience.basis: Deputy-chief command and prior sheriff-office service provide the strongest directly relevant management record in the field.

candidates.summary: Riordan is a law-enforcement candidate emphasizing patrol visibility, safety, morale, training, and resident communication.
highlights: Prioritizes patrol visibility, morale, and training [S2]

safety.basis: Patrol visibility and police capacity support an enforcement lean.

experience.basis: Policing experience supplies an institutional record, while no elected or command tenure is documented.

candidates.summary: Murphy is a former Centralia police officer and prior sheriff candidate emphasizing enforcement, constitutional rights, accountability, rural coverage, and deputy support.
highlights: Previously served as a police officer [S1][S2]
Explicitly emphasizes enforcement and rural coverage [S2]

safety.basis: Enforcement is explicit and paired with rural police coverage and deputy support.

experience.basis: Prior policing and campaign experience balance the absence of current command or elected tenure.
